result.stderr:
CodeGenTools 2.0.109
2021 Ruan van Maarleveld
USAGE:
Generate Angular Page:
  CodeGenTools angular --name home --path ./pages --page
Generate Angular Component:
  CodeGenTools angular --name nav-bar --path ./components --service-file
  --story-file

  --page            (Default: false) Pass this flag to generate a page with
                    routing capabilities instead of a component

  -p, --path        Required. Relative path where to generate the component

  -n, --name        Required. The name of the component or page

  --service-file    (Default: true) Pass this flag to generate a service file
                    with the page or component

  --story-file      (Default: true) Pass this flag to generate a storybook file
                    with the page or component

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.

CodeGenTools 2.0.109
2021 Ruan van Maarleveld
USAGE:
Generate Lambda API:
  CodeGenTools lambda --add-elasticsearch --type api
Generate Dynamo Worker:
  CodeGenTools lambda --add-dynamo --type dynamo-worker
Generate Worker:
  CodeGenTools lambda --type worker
Generate SQS Worker:
  CodeGenTools lambda --type sqs-worker

  -t, --type             Required. Type of Lambda. Options are: api,
                         dynamo-worker, worker, sqs-worker

  --add-dynamo           Pass this flag to add DynamoDB to the project

  --add-elasticsearch    Pass this flag to add permissions for Elastic Search

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.

USAGE:
Generate Shared Package:
  CodeGenTools package --description "Helper methods to DI calculator service"
  --integrations dynamo

  -d, --description    Required. Description of this shared package

  --integrations       External packages to integrate with this Shared Project.
                       Seperated by a comma. Valid values are: dynamo

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

result.stderr:
CodeGenTools 2.0.109
2021 Ruan van Maarleveld
USAGE:
Run Setup as Microsoft:
  CodeGenTools setup --azure-org microsoft --azure-project Calculator_Project
  --build-variables-group-name "Build Variables" --feed-source-pat
  xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx --feed-source-url
  https://pkgs.dev.azure.com/microsoft/_packaging/Microsoft/nuget/v3/index.json
  --org-name "Microsoft (Pty) Ltd" --org-prefix MS

  --echo                          Echos the current Setup configuration

  --delete                        Delete a setup

  --org-name                      The Name of the orginazation e.g. Microsoft
                                  (Pty) Ltd

  --build-variables-group-name    (Default: Build Variables) Name of the
                                  Variable group containing all the build
                                  variables e.g. "Build Variables"

  --azure-org                     Name of the orginazation in Azure DevOps e.g.
                                  https://dev.azure.com/microsoft (Only the last
                                  part)

  --azure-project                 Project Name in Azure DevOps e.g.
                                  https://dev.azure.com/microsoft/Calculator_Pro
                                  ject (Only the last part)

  --org-prefix                    Prefix of the orginazation e.g. MS for
                                  Microsoft. Should be between 2 and 3 chars,
                                  and contain no numbers

  --feed-source-url               The source url of the private feed hosted in
                                  Azure Devops e.g.
                                  https://pkgs.dev.azure.com/microsoft/_packagin
                                  g/Microsoft/nuget/v3/index.json

  --feed-source-pat               Personal Access Token to access the private
                                  feed

  --help                          Display this help screen.

  --version                       Display version information.
